  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Caracterización de la arquitectura

Francisco Manuel González Nuño

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scater)
library(scuttle)
library(monocle)
library(SingleR)
library(cacoa)
source("Functions/run_cacoa_composition.R")

conflicted::conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("rename", "dplyr")

1 Carga de datos

readRDS("../Datos/sce_qc.rds") -> sce
rownames(sce) <- rowData(sce)$gene_name

2 Exploración de datos

vars <- getVarianceExplained(sce,
                             variables = c("batch", "patient",
                                           "region_long",
                                           "Gender", "Age",
                                           "AJCC.Stage", "Primary.Site"),
                             assay.type = "harmony")
plotExplanatoryVariables(vars)

2.1 PCA

plotReducedDim(sce,
               dimred = "PCA_harmony",
               colour_by = "region_long") +
  labs(title = "PCA - región") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Región"))

plotReducedDim(sce,
               dimred = "PCA_harmony",
               colour_by = "patient") +
  labs(title = "PCA - paciente") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Paciente"))

2.2 t-SNE

sce <- runTSNE(sce, 
               dimred = "PCA",
               # ncomponents = 2, 
               perplexity = 30)
               # max_iter = 2000)
plotTSNE(sce,
         colour_by = "patient") +
  labs(title = "t-SNE con PCs - paciente") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Paciente"))

plotTSNE(sce,
         colour_by = "region_long") +
  labs(title = "t-SNE con PCs - región") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Región"))

2.3 UMAP

set.seed(123)
sce <- runUMAP(sce,
               dimred = "PCA_harmony",
               n_neighbors = 10,
               min_dist = 0.15,
               metric = "cosine",
               # metric = "correlation",
               n_epochs = 2000
               )

plotUMAP(sce,
         colour_by = "patient") +
  labs(title = "UMAP con PCs - paciente") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Paciente"))

plotUMAP(sce,
         colour_by = "region_long") +
  labs(title = "UMAP con PCs - región") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Región"))

ggcells(sce,
        mapping = aes(x = UMAP.1,
                      y = UMAP.2,
                      colour = region_long)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) + 
  facet_wrap(~patient,
             scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1",
       y = "UMAP 2",
       colour = "Región") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15))

2.4 Anotación celular

Mediante métodos automáticos (como SingleR), se pueden asignar etiquetas de tipo celular a cada célula basándose en la expresión génica y comparándola con referencias de tipos celulares conocidos. Esto podría ayudar a identificar qué tipos celulares están presentes en cada región anatómica y cómo se distribuyen. Si bien es cierto que los métodos automáticos pueden no ser perfectos.

Anotación con referencia estándar:

ref <- celldex::HumanPrimaryCellAtlasData()
# ref <- celldex::BlueprintEncodeData()
# ref <- celldex::MonacoImmuneData()
set.seed(123)
sce$SingleR_labels <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref,
  labels = ref$label.main,
  assay.type.test = "logcounts"
)
sce$cellAnnot <- sce$SingleR_labels$labels
plotReducedDim(sce,
               dimred = "UMAP",
               colour_by = "cellAnnot") +
  labs(title = "UMAP with SingleR annotations - cell type - standar ref") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Cell type"))

Anotación con referencia personalizada:

if(!(file.exists("../Datos/pb_ref_full.rds") & file.exists("../Datos/pb_ref_mid.rds"))) {
library(Matrix)

# 1. expresión
  
mat <- readMM("../Datos/CRC sc ref/matrix.mtx")

genes <- read.delim("../Datos/CRC sc ref/matrix.genes.tsv", header = FALSE)
barcodes <- read.delim("../Datos/CRC sc ref/matrix.barcodes.tsv", header = FALSE)

rownames(mat) <- make.unique(genes$V2)
colnames(mat) <- barcodes$V1


# 2. tSNE + labels

tsne <- read.delim("../Datos/CRC sc ref/crc10x_tSNE_cl_global.tsv", header = TRUE)
tsne <- tsne[tsne$NAME != "TYPE", ]
rownames(tsne) <- tsne$NAME


# 3. construir referencia

ref_crc <- SingleCellExperiment(
  assays = list(logcounts = mat),
  colData = tsne
)

c_genes <- base::intersect(rownames(ref_crc),
                           rownames(sce))
ref_crc <- ref_crc[c_genes,]

# 5. agregamos por tipo celular

## full

ref_pb_full <- aggregateAcrossCells(
  ref_crc,
  ids = ref_crc$ClusterFull,
  use.assay.type = "logcounts"
)
saveRDS(ref_pb, "../Datos/pb_ref_full.rds")

## mid

ref_pb_mid <- aggregateAcrossCells(
  ref_crc,
  ids = ref_crc$ClusterMidway,
  use.assay.type = "logcounts"
)
saveRDS(ref_pb_mid, "../Datos/pb_ref_mid.rds")


} else {
  # si ya existen los cargamos
  ref_pb_full <- readRDS("../Datos/pb_ref_full.rds")
  ref_pb_mid <- readRDS("../Datos/pb_ref_mid.rds")
}
pred_crc_full <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref_pb_full,
  labels = colnames(ref_pb_full),
  assay.type.test = "logcounts",
  assay.type.ref = "logcounts"
)

pred_crc_mid <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref_pb_mid,
  labels = colnames(ref_pb_mid),
  assay.type.test = "logcounts",
  assay.type.ref = "logcounts"
)

sce$annFull <- pred_crc_full$pruned.labels
sce$annMid <- pred_crc_mid$pruned.labels


plotReducedDim(sce[, !is.na(sce$annMid)],
               dimred = "UMAP",
               colour_by = "annMid") +
  labs(title = "UMAP with SingleR CRC annotations - cell type - custom ref") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Cell type"))

plotReducedDim(sce[, !is.na(sce$annFull)],
               dimred = "UMAP",
               colour_by = "annFull") +
  labs(title = "UMAP with SingleR CRC annotations - cell subtypes - custom ref") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Cell subtype"))

ggcells(sce[,!is.na(sce$annFull)],
        mapping = aes(x = UMAP.1,
                      y = UMAP.2,
                      colour = annFull)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75,
             size = 1) + 
  stat_density2d() + 
  facet_wrap(~region_long,
             scales = "free") + 
  labs(x = "UMAP 1",
       y = "UMAP 2",
       colour = "Anotación") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15))

2.5 Proporciones celulares

2.6 Cálculo de proporciones celulares por paciente y tejido

proporcs <- as.data.frame(colData(sce)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(annFull)) %>%
  group_by(patient, region_long, annFull) %>%
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  group_by(patient) %>%
  mutate(proportion_pat = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(region_long) %>%
  mutate(proportion_reg = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(proporcs, 
       aes(x = region_long, 
           y = proportion_reg, 
           fill = annFull)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Proporción de tipos celulares por región",
       x = "Localización",
       y = "Proporción",
       fill = "Tipo celular") +
  scale_fill_manual (values = paletteer::paletteer_d("ggsci::category20c_d3")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

(tabla_RL_ann <- table(
  sce$annFull,
  sce$region_long
  ))
##                                            
##                                             Colon Normal Metastasis Higado

##   Tumor cE07 (Goblet/Enterocyte)                       1                 0

##   Tumor cE11 (Enteroendocrine)                         0                24

##   cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                               0
##   cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                               0
##   cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                                        0
##   cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                               0
##   cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                            0
##   cE10 (Tuft)                                                       0
##   cM02 (Macrophage-like)                                            1
##   cP1 (Plasma IgA)                                                  0
##   Tumor cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                        83
##   Tumor cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                         1
##   Tumor cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                                 65
##   Tumor cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                         1

##   Tumor cE07 (Goblet/Enterocyte)                                    0

##

##   cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                                 0
##   cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                                          0
##   cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                                 0
##   cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                              0
##   cE10 (Tuft)                                                         0
##   cM02 (Macrophage-like)                                              0
##   cP1 (Plasma IgA)                                                    0
##   Tumor cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                          17
##   Tumor cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                           0
##   Tumor cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                                   57
##   Tumor cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                           0
##   Tumor cE05 (Enterocyte 2)                                           0
##   Tumor cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                        0
##   Tumor cE07 (Goblet/Enterocyte)                                      0
##   Tumor cE09 (Best4)                                                  0
##   Tumor cE10 (Tuft)                                                   1
##   Tumor cE11 (Enteroendocrine)                                        5
##                                            
##                                             Tumor Primario
##   cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                    0
##   cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                    0
##   cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                             5
##   cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                    2
##   cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                 1
##   cE10 (Tuft)                                            0
##   cM02 (Macrophage-like)                                 0
##   cP1 (Plasma IgA)                                       0
##   Tumor cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                            236
##   Tumor cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)              2
##   Tumor cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                     240
##   Tumor cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                              1
##   Tumor cE05 (Enterocyte 2)                             19

##   Tumor cE09 (Best4)                                    13
##   Tumor cE10 (Tuft)                                      2
##   Tumor cE11 (Enteroendocrine)                          17
ggplot(proporcs, 
       aes(x = patient, 
           y = proportion_pat, 
           fill = annFull)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Proporción de tipos celulares por paciente",
       x = "Paciente",
       y = "Proporción",
       fill = "Tipo celular") +
  scale_fill_manual (values = paletteer::paletteer_d("ggsci::category20c_d3")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

2.6.1 Análisis composicional

cao_CN <- run_cacoa_composition(
  sce = sce,
  target = "Tumor Primario",
  ref = "Colon Normal",
  celltype_col = "annFull",
  region_col = "region_long",
  patient_col = "patient",
  assay_name = "logcounts"
)
cao_CN$plotCellLoadings(show.pvals = T)

cao_MNL <- run_cacoa_composition(
  sce = sce,
  ref = "Tumor Primario",
  target = "Metastasis Nodo Linfático",
  celltype_col = "annFull",
  region_col = "region_long",
  patient_col = "patient",
  assay_name = "logcounts"
)
cao_MNL$plotCellLoadings(show.pvals = T)

cao_MH <- run_cacoa_composition(
  sce = sce,
  ref = "Tumor Primario",
  target = "Metastasis Higado",
  celltype_col = "annFull",
  region_col = "region_long",
  patient_col = "patient",
  assay_name = "logcounts"
)
cao_MH$plotCellLoadings(show.pvals = T)

2.7 Clustering

Se utiliza el algoritmo de clustering Louvain para identificar grupos de células que comparten patrones de expresión génica similares. Esto podría revelar subpoblaciones celulares dentro de cada región anatómica y ayudar a caracterizar la heterogeneidad celular presente en el tumor.

set.seed(123)

sce$cluster <- factor(
  igraph::cluster_louvain(
    scran::buildSNNGraph(
      sce,
      use.dimred = "PCA_harmony",
      k = 8
    )
  )$membership
)

plotReducedDim(sce,
               dimred = "UMAP",
               colour_by = "cluster") +
  labs(title = "UMAP with cluster") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Cluster"))

saveRDS(sce, "../Datos/sce_2.rds")
sessionInfo()
